conversation.content: Let's have a magic class. Today we are going to learn the casting rules of the fire magic 'Pyroblast · Modified' in the world of Azeroth, which is different from ordinary magic and has more of a sense of ritual.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.

In this world, the prerequisites for this magic are the Mage class, Kirin Tor reputation Exalted, and completion of Nazgrim's fire mage trial questline; the core effect is dealing massive fire damage to the target, applying a continuous burn effect, and additionally triggering an area explosion on a critical strike.
I have written down this rule.
The application scenario for this rule is single-target burst damage and focus-firing scenarios during the execute phase.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this rule.
